title: I'm in actual pain!
description: Neat (and cursed) sound pack purposed to make players express agony when they take damage.
body:
This sound pack is designed to work with any version of Minecraft that supports ressource packs.

It replaces every player-related damage sound effect.

This includes:
- 2 custom berry bush damage sound effect
- 3 custom general damage sound effects
- 3 custom fire damage sound effects
- 4 custom drowning damage sound effects
- 5 custom freezing damage sound effects

Please note that in some versions of Minecraft, certain sound effects might not work because those specific sounds are not present in the game itself, regardless of the sound pack.
